failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the catalog search result showing one matching item and produced an answer claiming there were no matches.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available beginner Jigsaw Puzzles costing more than $45.76. The ProductCatalogSearch tool returned one matching item with price 46.13. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, saying no items match. This failure depends directly on relevant tool output received at index 3 and contradicts that output. The error was not resolved later; the Evaluator incorrectly approved the bad answer.
